evidence.summary: Stage 4 unified local acceptance is committed and reproducible.
Provider adapters are closed to mock/local modes and external execution remains disabled.
Migration replay, backup/restore and data recovery drills are automated.
Identity, rate limiting, load baselines and deterministic fault injection are covered.
Phase 14 production operations checklist is explicit and fail-closed.
The observed local pending/retry Outbox backlog requires root-cause, cleanup and capacity evidence before a release candidate.
Production Secret Manager, credentials, rotation ownership and least-privilege inventory are unavailable.
Production DNS, TLS, ingress, MySQL, Redis and managed backup topology have not been provisioned or validated.
Production dashboards, alert routing, on-call ownership and release-window replay evidence do not exist.
Company legal entity and commercial Provider accounts are not available.
ICP and public release filing materials are not available.
Real Payment, SMS, object storage and Geo Provider credentials and sandbox contracts are unavailable.
Investor and production operating ownership have not been established.
OA and realtime Dashboard remain truthful readiness shells and are excluded from the three-app release candidate.
